arts.ttl: AS Monaco predicted XI v Dinamo Zagreb: Radoslaw Majecki nears return, Folarin Balogun to start
arts.sum: Radoslaw Majecki, injured in pre-season, is yet to feature for AS Monaco in the current campaign. However, for the first time since May, he has been included in the matchday…

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb vs Monaco predictions: Hosts to hit back under Bjelica
arts.sum: Dinamo Zagreb suffered a mauling at the hands of Bayern Munich last time out in the Champions League, but Simon Barlow expects a big turnaround when they take on Monaco.
